_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Collaboration in the Government Digital and Data profession typically involves working in a multidisciplinary project team, and contributing to working groups and wider professional communities. It requires a broad understanding of the technologies, principles and perspectives of related professions.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-012 (DG, cosine: 0.556), OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.549).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.550). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DDaT-only terms [broad, collaboration, communities, contributing, digital, government] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, build, business, cross, delivery, effective] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.857, R=0.868). Balanced P/R — the 39-word DDaT element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Collaboration in the Government Digital and Data profession typically involves w" and "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.590 ≈ STS 0.550 (gap 0.040). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [data]. DDaT-only: [broad, collaboration, communities, contributing, digital, government]. WIDAI-only: [ability, build, business, cross, delivery, effective].

signals.detail: STS 0.550 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
